stages.name: Paper-faithful PK/PD simulator reconstruction
stages.entry_gate: all critical PK/PD conflicts and units approved
stages.exit_gate: Stage IV unit-level analytical validations for deterministic dynamics pass

stages.name: Gymnasium-compatible anesthesia environment reconstruction
stages.entry_gate: Stage I deterministic simulator validated and environment constants approved
stages.exit_gate: Gymnasium contract and synthetic transition tests pass

stages.name: Stable-Baselines3 PPO integration or paper-style PPO wrapper
scope: prefer validated library PPO for the standard clipped algorithm
implement only environment and observation/state adapters directly
use a custom wrapper only for paper-specific auxiliary losses not expressible by the library contract
freeze dependency and hyperparameter registry before execution
stages.entry_gate: Stage II API validated; dependency and all PPO constants human-approved
stages.exit_gate: non-training integration and synthetic rollout tests pass

stages.name: Synthetic scientific validation
scope: environment invariance and causal observation checks
bounded non-scientific PPO integration smoke only after approval
stages.entry_gate: Stages I-III components exist and remain data-independent
stages.exit_gate: all validation-plan gates pass without clinical or exact-reproduction claims

stages.name: Subject-level 80/20 split and observation-template generation
stages.entry_gate: Stages I-IV accepted and split allocation method separately approved
stages.exit_gate: zero subject leakage and immutable split/test-seal checks pass

stages.name: P0S0 P1S0 P0S1 P1S1 training and evaluation
stages.entry_gate: Stage V split sealed and full execution protocol separately authorized
stages.exit_gate: prespecified control metrics and statistical analysis complete
